overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a magical great hall with floating candles, gothic stone architecture, and students dining at long tables. The scene features warm candlelight against dark stained glass windows, creating an atmospheric medieval fantasy setting reminiscent of a wizarding school.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing and conversing in the foreground

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating magically in mid-air throughout the hall ceiling
long wooden tables lined with students and set with plates and food
tall gothic windows with blue moonlight filtering through the colored glass
large stone fireplace with warm glow illuminating the left wall
high vaulted stone ceiling with magical floating lights and wooden rafters

segments.scene_description: A stationary cinematic view of a magical great hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden dining tables while two figures stand conversing in the foreground. Gothic architecture with towering stained glass windows and a large stone fireplace creates a warm, atmospheric medieval setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary cinematic view of a magical great hall that emphasizes the atmospheric scale of a medieval fantasy setting. It begins by capturing the warm glow of thousands of floating candles illuminating the vast space, where students in dark robes are seated at long wooden dining tables. The camera lingers on the scene as two figures converse in the foreground, framing the depth of the room. The view then expands to encompass the towering gothic architecture, shifting focus toward the intricate stained glass windows and a large stone fireplace that anchor the hall in a mood of ancient mystery.
